wire: _e{21,36}:An exception occurred|Cannot parse CSV file from 10.0.0.17|t:warning|#err_type:bad_file
notes: DogStatsD event — the `{21,36}` prefix encodes UTF-8 byte length of title and text. Events appear on the Datadog event timeline. Optional fields: `d:` timestamp, `h:` hostname, `p:` priority, `t:` alert type, `s:` source, `k:` aggregation key, `#` tag bag.
